TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Al_Alvarez, title = Al_Alvarez, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al_Alvarez} }

S.FORM: Al Alvarez sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA kawas tay 1912 , ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 10, Al Alvarez, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1995) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Al Alvarez htagan beh sa luntung. yaba ru yaya ga kahul qutix 'ubuy na yotay. sraral ga mqwas biru beh hanpust't' huo( Hall Hampstead) ru mqwas biru beh Oundle ru Corpus Christi College,Oxfoed. hiya ga wal magal ego te qutux lalu.suru lga,magal hopa pqwasan biru semong kengkyu. Al Alvarez cyux maki Nyocin ru Amelika pcbaq biru.trang pusan kawas(20 kawas) m'semong Censyome. hiya ga te sazing kneril nya,cyux maki sazing laqi Luke ru kate. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Al Alvarez sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA kawas tay 1912 , ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 10, Al Alvarez, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1995) qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Al Alvarez htagan beh sa luntung. yaba ru yaya ga kahul qutix 'ubuy na yotay. sraral ga mqwas biru beh hanpust't' huo( Hall Hampstead) ru mqwas biru beh Oundle ru Corpus Christi College,Oxfoed. hiya ga wal magal ego te qutux lalu.suru lga,magal hopa pqwasan biru semong kengkyu. Al Alvarez cyux maki Nyocin ru Amelika pcbaq biru.trang pusan kawas(20 kawas) m'semong Censyome. hiya ga te sazing kneril nya,cyux maki sazing laqi Luke ru kate. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: al al*arez s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, al al*arez, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja(qjanux nja) al al*arez ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa luntuŋ. jaβa ru jaja ɣa kaħul qutix ʔuβuj na jotaj. s~ɕraral ɣa mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ ħanpus~ɕtʔtʔ ħuo( ħall ħamps~ɕtea*) ru mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ oun*le ru ʦ~ʨorpus~ɕ ʦ~ʨħris~ɕti ʦ~ʨolleɣe,ox*oe*. ħija ɣa wal maɣal eɣo te qutux lalu.s~ɕuru lɣa,maɣal ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru s~ɕemoŋ keŋkju. al al*arez ʦ~ʨjux maki njoʦ~ʨin ru amelika pʦ~ʨβaq βiru.traŋ pus~ɕan kawas~ɕ(** kawas~ɕ) mʔs~ɕemoŋ ʦ~ʨens~ɕjome. ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ kneril nja,ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕaziŋ laqi luke ru kate. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
